name: Pfeffernusse (Peppernuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the Karo syrup for 2 minutes.
2. Add the sugar, butter, and salt to the hot syrup. Stir until the sugar and shortening are fully melted.
3. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
4. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (except flour) to the cooled mixture. Mix until a stiff dough forms.
5. Chill the dough thoroughly; it can even be frozen.
6. Roll the chilled dough into rolls about the width of a finger.
7. Cut the rolls with a knife into small, pillow-shaped pieces.
8. Flatten each pillow and bake in a moderate oven (approximately 350°F) for 8-10 minutes. This is an older family recipe, and the exact baking time may vary.
